# `api.contacts.get_primary_details`

> `GET /contacts/{contactId}/primarydetails` — ACPortal

**Python**

```python
api.contacts.get_primary_details(contact_id: str) -> ContactPrimaryDetails
```

**CLI**

```bash
ab contacts get_primary_details <contact_id>
```

GET /contacts/{contactId}/primarydetails

## Response

Returns `ContactPrimaryDetails`.

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `id` | `Optional[int]` | no | Contact integer ID |
| `fullName` | `Optional[str]` | no | Full display name |
| `email` | `Optional[str]` | no | Primary email |
| `phone` | `Optional[str]` | no | Primary phone |
| `company` | `Optional[dict]` | no | Associated company (full object) |
| `companyId` | `Optional[str]` | no | Company UUID |
| `companyName` | `Optional[str]` | no | Company name |
| `cellPhone` | `Optional[str]` | no | Cell phone number |
| `fax` | `Optional[str]` | no | Fax number |
| `address` | `Optional[CompanyAddress]` | no | Contact address |
